subcodes.first_line: O Hasan!  Hearken unto the call of Husayn Who hath been incarcerated in the prison fortress of 'Akka by reason of that which the hands of the heedless have wrought
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن اسمتع ندآء الحسین الذی سجن فی حصن عکا بما اکتسبت ایدی الغافلین
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @apocalyptic imagery, @Seal of the Prophets, @Word of God the cause of creation, @transcendence; unknowability of God
